scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('package.json')) process.exit(1); console.log('contracts baseline build check passed')"
scripts.lint: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); if(!p.name.startsWith('@ilm/')) process.exit(1); console.log('contracts baseline lint check passed')"
scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('package.json')) process.exit(1); console.log('contracts baseline test check passed')"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); if(!p.type) process.exit(1); console.log('contracts baseline typecheck passed')"
